patient_level_assumption: case_id IS patient_id per FDAT/TCIA directory convention. The PETCT_<hex> directories at the top level of the FDAT release are anonymized patient identifiers; per-study scans (where present) are stored as date-named subdirectories under each patient (per Gatidis et al., Sci Data 2022, doi: 10.1038/s41597-022-01718-3). The Step 4 extraction in process_autopet_i.ipynb keys files by parts[1] of the zip path = patient_id; for the ~12% of patients with multiple longitudinal studies (1014 studies / 900 patients in the full cohort) only one study per patient was retained (the alphabetically-last one), which is the desired design for conformal exchangeability (avoids within-patient longitudinal correlation). 461 unique case_ids = 461 unique patients.
